title: Temporal.ZonedDateTime
description: Root `Temporal.ZonedDateTime` (instant + time zone + calendar) round-trips across JSON and binary, returning a real ZonedDateTime on decode.
notes: JSON serializes via `toJSON()` (a `...[TimeZone]` string carrying the zone) and revives with `Temporal.ZonedDateTime.from(...)`; the time-zone annotation is preserved through the round-trip.
